sn1.25:1.1: “An arahant monk, one who is done,
sn1.25:1.4: Would he say, ‘They speak to me’?”
sn1.25:2.1: “An arahant monk, one who is done,
sn1.25:2.5: Skillful, knowing harmonious gnosis with regard to the world,
sn1.25:2.6: he uses expressions just as expressions.”
sn1.25:3.1: “An arahant monk, one who is done,
sn1.25:3.5: that he’d say, ‘They speak to me’?”
sn1.25:4.2: whose knot of conceit is dispersed, no knots exist at all.
sn1.25:5.2: Skillful, knowing harmonious gnosis with regard to the world,
sn1.25:5.3: he uses expressions just as expressions.”
